name: Aesthetic World
short_description: Aesthetic World is a vaporwave simulator. Enter paradise and walk, bounce, drive or shoot your way around this environment of aesthetic bliss...
detailed_description:
Developer Note:

Aesthetic World is no longer available for purchase due to the games unfortunate cancellation. All previous owners can still play the last version of the game with the exception of some modes and levels. The game was undergoing a massive overhaul which caused us to lock some modes until they were updated, however the game was cancelled before these changes could ever be implemented. We apologize for any inconvenience caused.

Aesthetic World


A Vaporwave world full of aesthetic things and activities. A computer to choose the music, a shooting range to relieve the days stress, our custom Aesthetic-AHX car to race around paradise, a fantastic Vaporwave soundtrack to accompany the experience and if that sounds good to you prepare to get lost in paradise together with multiplayer! (Coming Soon).

Retrowave Drive


The newest addition to Aesthetic World, Retrowave Drive is the brand new racing mode where you drive the Aesthetic-AHX to the retro metropolis. With a great track to drive to, the blazing sun in the distance and neon lights everywhere...the 80's fantasy never looked so good.

Lucifer's Forest


Lucifer's Forest is our unfinished horror game, We scrapped the project a while back but we include it with Aesthetic World as a bonus game.
